title: Did the detectives save the diamonds?

meanings.usage: 包装好的物品，常指邮寄的包裹
偷东西的人，复数形式为thieves
政府检查进口货物和旅客行李的机构
形容非常有价值的东西
飞机起飞和降落的区域

examples.en: Two detectives were keeping guard at the door.
Two men took the parcel off the plane.
examples.zh: 两个人把包裹从飞机上拿下来。

examples.en: They carried it into the Customs House.
examples.zh: 他们把它搬进了海关大楼。

examples.en: To their surprise, the parcel was full of stones.
examples.zh: 令他们惊讶的是，包裹里满是石头。

examples.en: Detectives were waiting at the airport all morning.
examples.zh: 侦探们整个上午都在机场等待。

examples.en: A few hours earlier, someone had told the police.
examples.zh: 几个小时前，有人告诉了警察。

examples.en: The precious parcel was full of stones and sand.
examples.zh: 这个珍贵的包裹里装满了石头和沙子。

examples.en: They took the parcel off the plane.
examples.zh: 他们把包裹从飞机上拿下来。

examples.en: Detectives were waiting at the airport all morning.
examples.zh: 侦探们整个上午都在机场等待。

examples.en: They were expecting a parcel from South Africa.
examples.zh: 他们正期待从南非来的包裹。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻或时间段正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去正在进行的动作，常与when/while等连词搭配使用

examples.en: The plane was late and detectives were waiting at the airport.
examples.zh: 飞机晚点了，侦探们正在机场等候。

examples.en: While two detectives were keeping guard, two others opened the parcel.
examples.zh: 当两名侦探在门口看守时，另外两人打开了包裹。

grammar.title: 过去进行时与一般过去时的对比 (Past Continuous vs Past Simple)
grammar.definition: 过去进行时表示正在进行的动作，一般过去时表示已完成的动作
grammar.structure: 过去进行时: was/were + doing / 一般过去时: did
grammar.usage: 当两个过去动作同时发生时，用while连接进行时态的动作；表示短暂动作或主句动作用一般过去时

examples.en: When the plane arrived, some detectives were waiting inside.
examples.zh: 当飞机到达时，一些侦探正在里面等候。

examples.en: Two men took the parcel off the plane.
examples.zh: 两个人把包裹从飞机上拿下来。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时间之前已经完成的动作
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去的过去发生的事情，常与a few hours earlier等时间状语连用

examples.en: A few hours earlier, someone had told the police.
examples.zh: 几个小时前，有人已经告诉过警察了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + was/were + 动词-ing + 时间/地点

original.en: Detectives were waiting at the airport all morning.
original.zh: 侦探们整个上午都在机场等待。

imitations.en: I was reading a book in the library all evening.
imitations.zh: 我整个晚上都在图书馆看书。

imitations.en: She was working in the office yesterday.
imitations.zh: 她昨天一直在办公室工作。

sentencePatterns.pattern: When + 一般过去时 + 主句(过去进行时)

original.en: When the plane arrived, some detectives were waiting inside.
original.zh: 当飞机到达时，一些侦探正在里面等待。

imitations.en: When the teacher came in, students were talking.
imitations.zh: 当老师进来时，学生们正在聊天。

sentencePatterns.pattern: While + 主语 + was/were + 动词-ing + 主语 + 动词-ed

original.en: While two detectives were keeping guard, two others opened the parcel.
original.zh: 当两名侦探在门口看守时，另外两人打开了包裹。

imitations.en: While my mother was cooking, I was doing my homework.
imitations.zh: 当我妈妈做饭时，我正在做作业。

imitations.en: While he was sleeping, it was raining outside.
imitations.zh: 当他在睡觉时，外面正在下雨。

original.en: To their surprise, the parcel was full of stones and sand.
original.zh: 令他们惊讶的是，包裹里满是石头和沙子。

imitations.en: To our surprise, he passed the exam easily.
imitations.zh: 令我们惊讶的是，他轻松通过了考试。

imitations.en: To his surprise, the gift was a beautiful watch.
imitations.zh: 令他惊讶的是，礼物是一块漂亮的手表。
